mapper.select:
select a.id,a.arrival_no,a.order_id,a.warehouse_id,a.arrival_date,a.arrival_number,a.qualified_number, a.unqualified_number,a.status,a.abnormal_note,a.operator_id,a.remark,a.create_time, a.update_time,a.deleted,po.order_no orderNo,w.name warehouseName from arrival a left join purchase_order po on a.order_id = po.id left join warehouse w on a.warehouse_id = w.id
a.deleted = 0
and a.arrival_no like concat('%',#{q.arrivalNo},'%')
and po.order_no like concat('%',#{q.orderNo},'%')
and w.name like concat ('%',#{q.warehouseName},'%')
and a.arrival_date between #{q.arrivalDateBegin} and #{q.arrivalDateEnd}
and a.status =#{q.status}
order by a.create_time desc, a.id desc

select a.id,a.arrival_no,a.order_id,a.warehouse_id,a.arrival_date,a.arrival_number,a.qualified_number, a.unqualified_number,a.status,a.abnormal_note,a.operator_id,a.remark,a.create_time, a.update_time,a.deleted,po.order_no orderNo,w.name warehouseName from arrival a left join purchase_order po on a.order_id = po.id left join warehouse w on a.warehouse_id = w.id where a.id = #{arrivalId} and a.deleted =0
select id from arrival where id = #{arrivalId} and deleted = 0 for update
